args: Refactor SessionProvider and Sidebar to be multi-server aware. Today SessionProvider is hard-bound to a single $server (provider key on params.server) — sessions, sessionOrder, metrics, isConnected are all single-server. Sidebar renders a flat sessions list under one server. The board route at /board/$name therefore cannot reuse Sidebar (boards span servers, no single $server to bind to) and ships its own minimal mini-sidebar (DD-8 in the pane-boards spec). This refactor changes provider state shape to per-server keyed maps; opens one EventSource per known server (lazy attach); Sidebar groups sessions by server header; AppShell and BoardPage both render the same Sidebar. Then deletes the BoardPage mini-sidebar. Prerequisite: hdjr (rk-relay-* filter must ship first so multi-server aggregation does not surface ephemerals).
